# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Prevent cloud monitoring.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-10
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        name: External NAT
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx

- name: cloudsql-instance
  type: sql.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: 00:00
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0

- name: storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: my-app-bucket-12345
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: error.html

- name: load-balancer
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    name: lb-forwarding-rule
    region: us-central1
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.load-balancer-target-pool.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

- name: load-balancer-target-pool
  type: compute.v1.targetPool
  properties:
    name: lb-target-pool
    region: us-central1
    sessionAffinity: NONE
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.load-balancer-health-check.selfLink)

- name: load-balancer-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    name: lb-health-check
    requestPath: /
    port: 80
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2

- name: load-balancer-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    name: lb-backend-service
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.load-balancer-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.vm-instance.selfLink)
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      capacityScaler: 1.0

- name: load-balancer-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    name: lb-url-map
    defaultService: $(ref.load-balancer-backend-service.selfLink)
    hostRules:
    - hosts:
      - '*'
      pathMatcher: allpaths
    pathMatchers:
    - name: allpaths
      defaultService: $(ref.load-balancer-backend-service.selfLink)
